title: Triple Barrier Method for ML Training Labels
summary: Replace simple binary up/down labels used in ML training with Triple Barrier labels that reflect real trade viability: upper barrier (take-profit hit), lower barrier (stop-loss hit), or vertical barrier (time expiry). This aligns ML training targets with actual profit-and-loss outcomes rather than directional correctness, which reduces overfitting and improves out-of-sample signal quality.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Execution Quality & Exit Optimization
